nasb.text: Their heart is faithless; Now they must bear their guilt. The Lord will break down their altars And destroy their sacred pillars.

esv.text: Their heart is false; now they must bear their guilt. The Lord will break down their altars and destroy their pillars.

cnv.text: 他們心懷詭詐， 現在要承擔這罪的懲罰。 耶和華必拆毀他們的祭壇， 毀壞他們的柱像。

ccb.text: 他们心怀诡诈，必受惩罚。 耶和华要拆毁他们的祭坛， 打碎他们的神柱。
